lines.english: Lesson 35
lines.chinese: 第35课
lines.raw: Lesson 35 | 第35课

lines.english: Justice was done
lines.chinese: 正义得以伸张
lines.raw: Justice was done | 正义得以伸张

lines.english: The word 'justice' is given two different meanings in the text.
lines.chinese: 在课文中，“正义”一词被赋予了两种不同的含义。
lines.raw: The word 'justice' is given two different meanings in the text. | 在课文中，“正义”一词被赋予了两种不同的含义。

lines.english: What is the distinction between them?
lines.chinese: 它们之间有什么区别呢？
lines.raw: What is the distinction between them? | 它们之间有什么区别呢？

lines.english: The word justice is usually associated with courts of law.
lines.chinese: “正义”一词通常与法庭联系在一起。
lines.raw: The word justice is usually associated with courts of law. | “正义”一词通常与法庭联系在一起。

lines.english: We might say that justice has been done when a man's innocence or guilt has been proved beyond doubt.
lines.chinese: 当一个人的清白或罪行被无可置疑地证明时，我们可能会说正义得到了伸张。
lines.raw: We might say that justice has been done when a man's innocence or guilt has been proved beyond doubt. | 当一个人的清白或罪行被无可置疑地证明时，我们可能会说正义得到了伸张。

lines.english: Justice is part of the complex machinery of the law.
lines.chinese: 正义是法律复杂机制的一部分。
lines.raw: Justice is part of the complex machinery of the law. | 正义是法律复杂机制的一部分。

lines.english: Those who seek it, undertake an arduous journey and can never be sure that they will find it.
lines.chinese: 追求正义的人会踏上一段艰难的旅程，而且永远无法确定他们是否会找到它。
lines.raw: Those who seek it, undertake an arduous journey and can never be sure that they will find it. | 追求正义的人会踏上一段艰难的旅程，而且永远无法确定他们是否会找到它。

lines.english: Judges, however wise or eminent, are human and can make mistakes.
lines.chinese: 法官，无论多么明智或杰出，都是人，也可能犯错误。
lines.raw: Judges, however wise or eminent, are human and can make mistakes. | 法官，无论多么明智或杰出，都是人，也可能犯错误。

lines.english: There are rare instances when justice almost ceases to be an abstract concept.
lines.chinese: 在极少数情况下，正义几乎不再是一个抽象的概念。
lines.raw: There are rare instances when justice almost ceases to be an abstract concept. | 在极少数情况下，正义几乎不再是一个抽象的概念。

lines.english: Reward or punishment are meted out quite independent of human interference.
lines.chinese: 奖励或惩罚在完全没有人类干预的情况下被施加。
lines.raw: Reward or punishment are meted out quite independent of human interference. | 奖励或惩罚在完全没有人类干预的情况下被施加。

lines.english: At such times, justice acts like a living force.
lines.chinese: 在这种时候，正义就像一股活生生的力量。
lines.raw: At such times, justice acts like a living force. | 在这种时候，正义就像一股活生生的力量。

lines.english: When we use a phrase like 'it serves him right',
lines.chinese: 当我们使用“活该”这样的短语时，
lines.raw: When we use a phrase like 'it serves him right', | 当我们使用“活该”这样的短语时，

lines.english: we are, in part, admitting that a certain set of circumstances has enabled justice to act of its own accord.
lines.chinese: 我们部分承认了某种情况使正义得以自然而然地发挥作用。
lines.raw: we are, in part, admitting that a certain set of circumstances has enabled justice to act of its own accord. | 我们部分承认了某种情况使正义得以自然而然地发挥作用。

lines.english: When a thief was caught on the premises of a large jewellery store one morning,
lines.chinese: 一天早上，当一个小偷在一家大型珠宝店的院子里被抓到时，
lines.raw: When a thief was caught on the premises of a large jewellery store one morning, | 一天早上，当一个小偷在一家大型珠宝店的院子里被抓到时，

lines.english: the shop assistants must have found it impossible to resist the temptation to say 'it serves him right'.
lines.chinese: 店员们一定觉得很难抵制住说“活该”的冲动。
lines.raw: the shop assistants must have found it impossible to resist the temptation to say 'it serves him right'. | 店员们一定觉得很难抵制住说“活该”的冲动。

lines.english: The shop was an old converted house with many large, disused fireplaces and tall, narrow chimneys.
lines.chinese: 这家店是一座由老房子改建而成的，有很多大的废弃壁炉和又高又窄的烟囱。
lines.raw: The shop was an old converted house with many large, disused fireplaces and tall, narrow chimneys. | 这家店是一座由老房子改建而成的，有很多大的废弃壁炉和又高又窄的烟囱。

lines.english: Towards midday, a girl heard a muffled cry coming from behind one of the walls.
lines.chinese: 快到中午时，一个女孩听到墙后传来一阵低沉的哭声。
lines.raw: Towards midday, a girl heard a muffled cry coming from behind one of the walls. | 快到中午时，一个女孩听到墙后传来一阵低沉的哭声。

lines.english: As the cry was repeated several times,
lines.chinese: 哭声重复了几次之后，
lines.raw: As the cry was repeated several times, | 哭声重复了几次之后，

lines.english: she ran to tell the manager who promptly rang up the fire brigade.
lines.chinese: 她跑去告诉经理，经理立刻给消防队打了电话。
lines.raw: she ran to tell the manager who promptly rang up the fire brigade. | 她跑去告诉经理，经理立刻给消防队打了电话。

lines.english: The cry had certainly come from one of the chimneys,
lines.chinese: 哭声确实是从一个烟囱里传出来的，
lines.raw: The cry had certainly come from one of the chimneys, | 哭声确实是从一个烟囱里传出来的，

lines.english: but as there were so many of them, the firemen could not be certain which one it was.
lines.chinese: 但由于烟囱太多，消防员无法确定是哪一个。
lines.raw: but as there were so many of them, the firemen could not be certain which one it was. | 但由于烟囱太多，消防员无法确定是哪一个。

lines.english: They located the right chimney by tapping at the walls and listening for the man's cries.
lines.chinese: 他们通过敲击墙壁并聆听那个人的哭声来确定正确的烟囱。
lines.raw: They located the right chimney by tapping at the walls and listening for the man's cries. | 他们通过敲击墙壁并聆听那个人的哭声来确定正确的烟囱。

lines.english: After chipping through a wall which was eighteen inches thick,
lines.chinese: 在凿穿一堵18英寸厚的墙后，
lines.raw: After chipping through a wall which was eighteen inches thick, | 在凿穿一堵18英寸厚的墙后，

lines.english: they found that a man had been trapped in the chimney.
lines.chinese: 他们发现一个人被困在烟囱里了。
lines.raw: they found that a man had been trapped in the chimney. | 他们发现一个人被困在烟囱里了。

lines.english: As it was extremely narrow, the man was unable to move,
lines.chinese: 由于烟囱非常狭窄，那个人无法动弹，
lines.raw: As it was extremely narrow, the man was unable to move, | 由于烟囱非常狭窄，那个人无法动弹，

lines.english: but the fire fighters were eventually able to free him by cutting a huge hole in the wall.
lines.chinese: 但消防员最终通过在墙上凿开一个大洞，成功地解救了他。
lines.raw: but the fire fighters were eventually able to free him by cutting a huge hole in the wall. | 但消防员最终通过在墙上凿开一个大洞，成功地解救了他。

lines.english: The sorry-looking, blackened figure that emerged,
lines.chinese: 那个狼狈不堪、浑身漆黑的人影出现后，
lines.raw: The sorry-looking, blackened figure that emerged, | 那个狼狈不堪、浑身漆黑的人影出现后，

lines.english: admitted at once that he had tried to break into the shop during the night but had got stuck in the chimney.
lines.chinese: 立刻承认他曾试图在夜间闯入商店，但被卡在了烟囱里。
lines.raw: admitted at once that he had tried to break into the shop during the night but had got stuck in the chimney. | 立刻承认他曾试图在夜间闯入商店，但被卡在了烟囱里。

lines.english: He had been there for nearly ten hours.
lines.chinese: 他已经在里面待了将近十个小时。
lines.raw: He had been there for nearly ten hours. | 他已经在里面待了将近十个小时。

lines.english: Justice had been done even before the man was handed over to the police.
lines.chinese: 甚至在将那个人移交给警方之前，正义就已经得到了伸张。
lines.raw: Justice had been done even before the man was handed over to the police. | 甚至在将那个人移交给警方之前，正义就已经得到了伸张。
